meta.purpose: Define capability stages and measurable growth for issue decomposition judgment.
meta.load_condition: Load when coaching, improvement, or practice measurement is requested.

stages.name: Layer Splitter
stages.description: Breaks work into horizontal layers (database, API, frontend). Creates issues without acceptance criteria. Does not triage. No tracer bullet. Issues depend on each other implicitly.
indicators: No tracer bullet or architecture validation

stages.name: Vertical Slicer
stages.description: Breaks work into vertical slices (end-to-end behaviors). Writes acceptance criteria for each issue. Triage before execution. Uses tracer bullets. Marks explicit dependencies.
indicators: Tracer bullet as the first issue

stages.name: Decomposition Strategist
stages.description: Selects the right granularity for each situation. Identifies when an issue is too large or too small. Manages dependency graphs across many issues. Designs issue sequences that maximize parallel work while respecting blocking dependencies.
indicators: Issues are at the right granularity — not too large, not too small
Issue sequences designed to maximize parallel work

evolution_layers.name: From layer splitter to vertical slicer
evolution_layers.capability: Consistently decompose work into vertical slices with acceptance criteria and triage

evolution_layers.name: From vertical slicer to strategist
evolution_layers.capability: Manage granularity, dependencies, and parallelism across many issues

measurement.how: Count issues that deliver end-to-end behavior vs. issues that cover one layer only.
Count issues with explicit acceptance criteria vs. total issues.
Count issues that were triaged before implementation began vs. total implemented issues.
